one_time_description: TOPGAS settlement proceeds of $17,000,000 and Blood Tribe Mismanagement of Assets Specific Claims Trust contribution of $12,648,702
economic_notes: Blood Tribe Agricultural Project Ltd. generated $428,810 in earnings. Blood Tribe operates oil and gas partnerships, agricultural projects, housing corporations, and various development entities. Gas royalties of $564,521 and oil royalties of $3,376,045 received in trust.
notes: Large one-time items include TOPGAS settlement proceeds of $17,000,000 and Specific Claims Trust contribution of $12,648,702. Five government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. 21 consolidated entities. Funds held in Ottawa Trust of $64,918,981 included in accumulated surplus. Blood Indian Band Housing Society not in compliance with CMHC reserve requirements - 5 year repayment plan agreed. Net financial assets per statement of changes was $121,818,865. Education expenses combined Kainai Education Society ($28,921,994) and Red Crow Community College ($16,135,399). Housing expenses combined Blood Band Housing Authority ($4,995,164) and Blood Indian Band Housing Society ($5,503,575). No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
